sessions.intent: Merge runtime2 (plang-types) into the branch and revise plan/stages/tests to match the new typed-value system.

before.assumptions: Branch was planning-only (no production code), so the merge would be clean. Stage 4 (type-entity) was the main overlap risk with the incoming plang-types work.
before.risk: plang-types reshapes the exact area Stage 4 targets; the plan, stage files, and test docs could be stale or contradicted by the merge.

actions.context: Committed the captured audio-transcription todo before merging.
Merged origin/runtime2 (plang-types: typed value system, math retype, runtime DLL type loading) — clean, zero production conflicts since branch was planning-only.

Revised the full plan to absorb plang-types: 1B (move type entity from app.data.type to type/this.cs, demote registry to type/list/this.cs), fold builder.Types.Entry onto the entity, index-miss = hard error. Stage 4 reframed as move+demote+fold (the entity already exists); Stage 2 simplified (dead module fallbacks, context-propagation plumbing at data/this.cs:144); Stage 1 type subtree grew (~55 files). Newtonsoft confirmed gone → data/Converter.cs dead.

after.health: green — merge clean, docs revised and internally consistent
after.notes: Decisions locked with Ingi: 1B (unify type entity under type/), Entry folds into type.@this, index-miss = error. Plan, four stage files, four deep dives, and both test docs updated. Ready to commit + push; test-designer can re-run from the revised plan.
